domain_name: Satellite imagery and geospatial ML for governance and monitoring

background_concepts.why_needed: Both readings apply deep learning models (object detection for brick kilns, image classification for indicator prediction) to satellite imagery, assuming the reader understands convolutional layers, feature maps, and supervised image classification without teaching them.

suggested_resources.title: Creating Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Image Classification (Programming Historian)
Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) — TensorFlow Core tutorial

background_concepts.concept: Remote sensing / satellite imagery basics (spectral bands, pixels, resolution)
background_concepts.why_needed: The papers treat satellite images as ready inputs (multispectral bands, spatial resolution, pixel digital numbers) without explaining how remote sensing data is composed or acquired, which is needed to understand the geospatial pipeline.

suggested_resources.title: Nighttime Lights — NASA Earthdata topic guide

background_concepts.concept: Nighttime luminosity as a proxy for economic activity
background_concepts.why_needed: Socio-economic prediction from satellite imagery builds directly on the established link between night-light brightness and GDP/economic activity, a convention the reading assumes rather than motivates.

suggested_resources.title: Illuminating Economic Growth Using Satellite Images (IMF Finance & Development)
Applications of nighttime light data in international development research (3ie)

domain_name: Satellite Imagery for Development Measurement and Targeting

background_concepts.concept: Nighttime luminosity as a socio-economic proxy
background_concepts.why_needed: The temporal prediction of development indicators relies on the well-established convention that satellite-observed light intensity correlates with income, poverty, and economic activity — a baseline assumption the paper does not explain.

suggested_resources.title: Illuminating Economic Growth Using Satellite Images (IMF F&D)

background_concepts.why_needed: Targeting and measurement work assumes familiarity with how satellite sensors capture imagery at given resolutions and bands, which determines what socio-economic signals can be extracted.

suggested_resources.title: Nighttime Lights — NASA Earthdata topic guide

domain_name: Digital delivery of social protection entitlements

background_concepts.concept: Aadhaar-Based Biometric Authentication (ABBA) and the Aadhaar-enabled PDS
background_concepts.why_needed: These readings center on exclusion and design flaws that arise when Aadhaar biometric authentication and ePOS machines are inserted into ration/PDS delivery; the mechanics of seeding, fingerprint authentication, and Fair Price Shops are assumed rather than explained.

suggested_resources.title: Aadhaar, biometrics, and the PDS in Jharkhand (Ideas for India)

background_concepts.concept: National Food Security Act / entitlements framework (rights-based social protection)
background_concepts.why_needed: The concept of 'entitlements' being delivered — legal claims to rations, pensions, and subsidies with defined per-capita quantities and beneficiary categories (Priority/AAY) — is the institutional backdrop the readings presume.

suggested_resources.title: National Food Security Act, 2013 (BYJU'S IAS notes)

domain_name: Technology-assisted grievance redress and citizen engagement in welfare programs

background_concepts.concept: Grievance redressal mechanism (institutional structure in Indian governance)
background_concepts.why_needed: These readings build feedback and complaint loops on top of India's formal grievance redress architecture (nodal officers, escalation, CPGRAMS-style portals); they assume readers know how a government grievance mechanism is supposed to function.

suggested_resources.title: CPGRAMS — Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System (official portal)
Grievance Redress Mechanism in Government (DFE/Government of India guide, PDF)

background_concepts.concept: Social audit as a social-accountability mechanism
background_concepts.why_needed: Civil-society-mediated redress and transparency systems for welfare schemes draw on the social-audit tradition (Gram Sabha verification of records against ground reality under MGNREGA Section 17); the readings assume this participatory-accountability model.

suggested_resources.title: A Guide to Conducting Social Audits (Accountability India, PDF)

background_concepts.concept: Welfare scheme entitlements (PDS/MGNREGA/pensions) that grievances concern
background_concepts.why_needed: Building engagement into 'welfare schemes' presumes the reader knows the specific entitlement programs (rations under NFSA, employment under MGNREGA) whose exclusion errors generate the complaints being surfaced.

suggested_resources.title: National Food Security Act, 2013 (BYJU'S IAS notes)
